mapper.select: select * from answers where question_id = #{questionId} and delete_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert: insert into answers ( question_id, member_id, content, delete_yn ) values ( #{questionId}, #{memberId}, #{content}, 'N' )
mapper.update: update answers set content = #{content}, delete_yn = 'N', updated_at = now() where question_id = #{questionId}
